74006.subject: The Career Skills AI Can’t Replace, According To AMD CEO Lisa Su
74006.body:
Forbes Edge

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/career-skills-ai-cant-replace-according-amd-ceo-lisa-su-lcx5c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BsRlN%2BaR9QJqtDAlcmlW1wQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3TMOcwtf39Psg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpy4zkr8~dk-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpy4zkr8-dk
  
At a time when many professionals are worried that artificial intelligence could short circuit their careers, Advanced Micro Devices CEO Lisa Su has offered a bigger-picture perspective about the critical role humans will continue to play despite major technological advancements.  In a recent commencement speech at her alma mater MIT, Su—who came in at No. 10 on Forbes’ 2025 list of the World’s Most Powerful Women—told graduates: “For everything that AI can do, AI can’t decide which problems are worth solving. It can’t make the hard judgments when the data is not there. It can’t take responsibility for the outcomes. These are actually our responsibilities and they matter now more than ever.” The tech CEO recounted other technology shifts of the past, including the birth of the internet, which changed how we communicate; mobile computing, which changed how we live; and cloud computing, which changed how we work. But unlike those previous developments, Su said that AI “has the potential to accelerate discovery in every field and help us solve problems that we’ve never been able to solve before.”  Nevertheless, she added, “Technology itself does not decide what the future looks like—the best people do.”  Read here to learn more about Su’s perspective on AI and why she says we don’t need more people who simply know how to use the tool—we need people who know how to apply it to solve big problems.  — Courtney Connley-Hampton, Careers Staff Writer WORK SMARTER  Practical insights and advice from Forbes staff and contributors to help you succeed in your job, accelerate your career and lead smarter. Not hearing back after applying to a job? Learn three reasons this happens—and key steps to fix this frustrating part of the job search—with strategies from career expert Colleen Batchelder. If you feel stuck in a job due to money, you can still make moves toward a pivot. Discover five solutions to the cash trap in a job you no longer love from career coach Caroline Ceniza-Levine. Are layoffs coming to your company? Here are 10 things a CEO may say to signal potential cuts—including “aligning resources to our highest priorities”—from career expert Mark Murphy. A coworker who starts a debate in every discussion can erode psychological safety on a team. Leaders should address this behavior to ensure ideas are heard, professor Benjamin Laker says. Deep Dive: Why Gen Z

Сезон літніх поїздок офіційно відкрито ☀️

Перш ніж перетнути кордон та ввімкнути улюблений плейлист, переконайся, що автомобіль і ти готові до поїздки.

Ось короткий чек-лист перед поїздкою:

✔ Твої права, техпаспорт і страховка дійсні за кордоном?

✔ Ти знаєш, де на маршруті є платні дороги або потрібна віньєтка?

✔ Твоя аптечка ще придатна до використання чи потребує оновлення з 2017 року?

✔ Вогнегасник на місці? Перевір термін придатності.

✔ Тиск у шинах, мастило, холодоагент, рідина для омивача: усе гаразд?

✔ Не можеш вибрати музику для поїздки? [Ми вже підготували дещо](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4YXGgOclvHVS7tpoSem3O9?si=bcaff343eeab4664)[тут.](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4YXGgOclvHVS7tpoSem3O9?si=bcaff343eeab4664)

І наостанок! Якщо збираєшся в далеку подорож на вживаному авто, варто перевірити його історію. Попередні пошкодження, проблеми з пробігом і приховані несправності можуть швидко перетворити відпустку на пригоду на узбіччі, якої ніхто не планував.

Знижку ніхто не просив, а вона вже тут: ЗНИЖКА 25 %

74003.subject: Derivatives Migration
74003.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

==Hi all, happy Wednesday!==

==Today, we're tracking a massive structural realignment in crypto market dynamics. While bitcoin faces a distinct slow bleed, reversing April’s institutional setup with $2B in global ETF outflows, the structural plumbing behind derivatives is moving at breakneck speed. The CFTC's recent clearance of its first regulated onshore bitcoin perpetuals, combined with CME Group's transition to a 24/7 trading schedule, effectively weakens the offshore regulatory arbitrage and the traditional weekend gap.==

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

BTC closed near $66,000 yesterday. May reversed April's institutional setup across the board. ETFs saw ~$2B in global outflows, snapping a two-month positive streak and erasing March–April's ~$4B of inflows.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4001c111-4a43-4e31-9e20-880d79289a1e/image.png?t=1780494615)
Caption: 

Treasury company purchases halved to ~$2B, still well off mid-2025 highs, still concentrated in Strategy. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d0e02e47-3132-49e0-9081-4cb449ac352f/image.png?t=1780494615)
Caption: 

Whale balances are contracting year-over-year at the fastest pace of 2026.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/2e111b81-704e-40fb-8d10-1ffe078d8413/image.png?t=1780494615)
Caption: 

CME open interest gave back its April gain, falling ~20% to $7B.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/44d72b5f-08e5-4ab0-99d4-064e7b51d863/image.png?t=1780494615)
Caption: 

All this while BTC's correlation profile in May offered little comfort. For most of the month, BTC tracked SPY and QQQ in the 0.4–0.6 range, behaving squarely as a risk asset, but as late-month selling accelerated, correlations to equities and gold alike collapsed toward zero. That outcome is arguably the worst-case framing for cross-asset portfolio construction. BTC drew down without the cover of macro contagion, stripping out the diversification benefits that would justify an allocation increase.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bfacb67-004c-4fd7-a2dd-c1c76fbf154c/image.png?t=1780494616)

74002.subject: $500 million in one month. No cap. No governance. No plan.
74002.body:
Ment Tech | Meant To Innovate

Автор: Ment Tech


Автор: Ment Tech

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/500-million-one-month-cap-governance-plan-menttechlabs-ennif?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BotEZ6hEYRt%2BqJjDNltwL8g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1jqJR-PuCgPsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpy40s35~3w-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpy40s35-3w
  
Microsoft Cancelled Claude Code. Uber Burned $3.4 Billion In Four Months. One Company Spent $500 Million In A Single Month. This Is Not A Spending Problem. This Is A Structural Crisis Nobody Prepared For. In the last two weeks, three stories broke that every founder, CTO, and enterprise technology buyer needs to read together. Not separately. Together. Microsoft cancelled most of its internal Claude Code licenses. Deadline: June 30. Engineers redirected to GitHub Copilot CLI. Uber burned through its entire $3.4 billion AI budget for 2026 in four months. By April. The COO publicly admitted there is no clear evidence that higher token consumption translates to better products. An unnamed enterprise accumulated $500 million in Claude AI charges in a single month. One month. Because nobody set a usage cap. And Amazon shut down an internal AI usage leaderboard after employees gamed it — running low-value prompts to boost their scores and inflating infrastructure costs with zero useful output. Same week. Four companies. One pattern. The Pattern Is Not Overspending. It Is A Billing Model Mismatch. Enterprise procurement was built for one model. AI broke it. THE OLD MODEL Flat fee · Per seat · Monthly invoice Predictable · Forecastable You know the tool. You know the users. You multiply. You budget. You approve. THE NEW REALITY Every prompt is billed. Every generation is billed. Every review, every debug, every agent loop. Usage compounds. Costs scale. Silently. The better the tool the higher the invoice. THE EVIDENCE Uber · $3.4B AI budget · Gone in 4 months Engineers using it: 32% → 84% in one month Cost per engineer: $500–$2,000/month Microsoft · Entire annual AI budget consumed in months Engineers across Windows, M365, Outlook, Teams, Surface Memo: "an important part of the learning" Translation: token billing at this scale has no budget ceiling Unnamed Company · $500M in one month No cap. No governance. No controls. SAM ALTMAN SAID IT IN MARCH "Intelligence is a utility, like electricity or water. People buy it from us on a meter." They treated it like SaaS. It bills like a utility. That gap is the crisis. The Numbers Behind The Crisis US AI software prices have jumped between 20% and 37% in 2026. Goldman Sachs estimates that AI agents could multiply enterprise token demand 24 times by 2030. Gartner forecasts AI agent software spendi
